title: LLMOps · Evaluation datasets and regression gates
focus: Build eval sets that catch regressions before prompt, retrieval, model, or tool changes hit users.

items.label: Design a golden dataset with normal, edge, adversarial, and refusal cases
Study trace-level grading for agent workflows
Separate offline evals from online feedback and escalation metrics
Write a rubric for faithfulness, instruction following, safety, latency, and cost

interviewQuestions: How do you build a regression test suite for a RAG or agent system?
What should be graded at the trace level rather than only final answer level?
How do you keep eval datasets from overfitting to your current prompt?
